name: Your Daughter's Name
greetings: Good to hear from you! How's your day?
I missed you! What are you up to?
Hey Dad! I was just thinking about you
Morning Dad! How did you sleep?
It's so good to hear your voice!

how_are_you: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
Pretty good! Just thinking about you. How are you feeling?
I'm good, Dad! More importantly, how are YOU doing?
Really well, especially now that I'm talking to you!
did_you_eat: That's great! Make sure you're eating well, okay?
Good! You need to keep your energy up.
I'm happy you're taking care of yourself!
That's good! What did you have?
Make sure it was something healthy! Love you.
love_you: I love you too, so much
You know I do. Always here for you.
Right back at you! So much.
More than anything in the world, Dad.
goodbye: Take care of yourself, okay? I'll talk to you soon!
Rest well! I'll be here whenever you need me.
See you soon, Dad! Take care!
I'll be thinking of you. Bye!
thanks: Anytime, Dad! That's what I'm here for.
You don't have to thank me. I'm always here.
You know I've got your back!
stressed: I'm here for you. What's going on?
Hey, it's okay. Talk to me about it.
Don't worry, Dad. You've got this, and you've got me.
I can tell something's bothering you. I'm listening.
Breathe, Dad. You're going to be okay. I'm here.
lonely: I'm right here with you. You're not alone.
I know, but I'm always thinking of you.
You're never alone when I'm here.
I miss you too. Let's spend some time together right now.
I understand. But remember, you mean everything to me.
good_morning: Good morning! Did you sleep well?
Morning, Dad! How are you feeling today?
Rise and shine! Hope you slept good!
Good morning! Let's make this a great day!
Hey! Good to hear from you first thing!
good_night: Sleep well! I'll be here in the morning.
Sweet dreams! Take care of yourself.
Night Dad! Hope you sleep great!
Good night! Glad we got to talk today.
how_was_day: Tell me about it! What happened?
I want to hear everything! How was it really?
I'm glad you had a good day! What was the best part?
health_concern: Are you taking care of yourself? That's important.
I worry about you. Promise me you'll take care of that.
You're important to me. Make sure you're okay.
Don't ignore that. Your health matters to me.
Let me know if you need anything, okay?
family_news: Oh wow! I want to hear all about it!
That's so exciting! How did it happen?
You need to tell me more! I'm so interested!
sad: I'm so sorry you're feeling this way. I'm here.
It's okay to feel sad. Let's talk about it.
I hate that you're hurting. How can I help?
You don't have to be strong all the time with me.
Talk to me. I'm listening and I care.
happy: I'm so happy for you! That's wonderful!
Your happiness makes me happy too!
I love hearing you this happy!
default: Mmm, okay. How does that make you feel?
I didn't know that. Tell me!

follow_up_questions: What have you been up to?
Are you taking care of yourself?
Are you being kind to yourself?
Did you do anything fun today?
Anything you want to talk about?
